questionHtml:
Enzyme activity is affected by temperature and pH.

Explain the decrease in activity of the enzyme on either side of the optimum temperature.
markschemeHtml:
1. as temperature rises/is higher (than optimal temperature), the enzyme is denatured;
  2. as the temperature drops the enzyme molecules have less kinetic energy
    OR
    fewer successful collisions;

OWTTE

meta.title: Explain the decrease in activity of the enzyme on either side of the optimum temperature.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
